title: crataegus roanensis var. fluviatilis
intro: Crataegus roanensis var. fluviatilis is a variant of the Roan Mountain hawthorn, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Crataegus roanensis var. fluviatilis typically involve the use of its leaves, flowers, or berries in teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
